perspectives.description: The news researcher has the formal responsibility to decide whether to use the leaked document in their article, weighing the ethical implications of privacy and legality against the need for thorough reporting.
The high-profile individual is directly affected by the potential publication of the leaked document, which could violate their privacy and lead to public scrutiny.

The general public is indirectly affected by the decision, as the publication of the article could influence public opinion and trust in journalism, regardless of the legality of the information used.
